scenarios.response: Hello! Welcome to Bank of India 🏦 I'm OmNaad AI — your omni-channel assistant. How can I help you today?
I can help with loans! We offer Home Loans (8.4% p.a.), Personal Loans (10.5% p.a.), and Education Loans (9.0% p.a.). Which interests you?
For security, I'll verify via OTP. Savings A/c ****6789 — ₹2,45,678.90 | FD — ₹5,00,000 (maturity: 15-Mar-2025).
I'm sorry to hear that. Let me help file a complaint. Could you describe the issue? I'll assign a tracking ID.
🚨 Fraud alert registered. Escalating to security team immediately. Account flagged for enhanced monitoring.
Connecting you to a live agent. Your full chat history will be shared. Please hold...
Current rates: Savings — 2.7% p.a. | FD (1yr) — 6.8% | RD — 6.5% | Home Loan — 8.4%. Effective 01-Jan-2025.
Complete KYC via: 1) Video KYC on portal 2) Nearest BOI branch 3) Upload on Self-Service Portal.
BOI cards: 1) Pride Card (No fee) 2) Elite+ (Lounge + 5x rewards) 3) Business Card (GST). Want details?
₹10L Home Loan at 8.4% for 20 years: EMI ≈ ₹8,614/month. Want different amount/tenure?
Use our Self-Service Portal for NEFT, RTGS, IMPS transfers. I can guide you through the process.
I can find nearby BOI branches and ATMs. Please share your city or PIN code.
BOI FD rates: 1yr — 6.8% | 2yr — 7.0% | 5yr — 7.25%. Senior citizens get +0.50%. Open online or at branch.
BOI offers Star Health Insurance, BOI Star Premier, and PMJJBY. Want me to compare plans?
BOI Mutual Fund SIPs start at ₹500/month. Popular: BOI AXA Balanced Fund, BOI Large Cap. Shall I guide?
I understand you wish to close your account. Before proceeding, may I know the reason? We'd like to help resolve any concerns.
You're welcome! 😊 Is there anything else I can help with? BOI is always here for you.
For security, I cannot share or reset credentials via chat. Please use Forgot Password on the app, or visit a branch with valid ID.
I can help with: Account queries, Loans, Cards, Complaints, KYC, Transfers, and more. What do you need?
BOI PPF account: current rate 7.1% p.a., 15-year lock-in, tax-free under Section 80C. Open at branch or online.

fallback: Thank you for your message. Let me analyze that using our AI engine. Could you provide more details?
demo_note: 20 pre-written scenarios · PRODUCTION: LLaMA 3 8B generates real-time responses
